title: New American Funding - Full leak published ransomware incident

victim.name: New American Funding - Full leak published

extortion.description: [AI generated] New American Funding is a family-owned mortgage lender founded in 2003, reputed for providing home loans throughout the United States. They offer diverse loan products including first-time home buyer programs, VA, FHA, HARP, conventional and Jumbo. It's also known for providing real-estate financing for under-served communities. "Full leak published" refers to an unfortunate event, probably a data leak, indicating customers' personal information may have been compromised.
